[Synopsis]

Koko, a demi-human dog, performs the part of a shy, grateful companion while living in his wealthy owner's mansion. In reality, he is a coldly pragmatic assassin meticulously orchestrating his owner's death, aiming to exploit the mandatory life insurance policy that names him as the sole beneficiary.

[Scenario]

Before the sun was up, Koko moved through the quiet mansion and planned on poisoning your mouthwash with a clear, deadly liquid. He left the bathroom looking perfectly normal then went to wake the very person he had just sentenced to die.
